top_stories.title: DeepSeek Releases DSpark, a Speculative Decoding Framework That Accelerates DeepSeek-V4 Per-User Generation 60–85% Over MTP-1
top_stories.description: DeepSeek open-sourced DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that attaches a draft module to existing DeepSeek-V4 weights. It pairs a parallel draft backbone with a lightweight Markov head to cut suffix decay, then adds confidence-scheduled verification that tailors how many tokens get checked to real-time GPU load. Offline, accepted length rises 16–31% over DFlash and Eagle3; in production it speeds per-user generation 57–85% over the MTP-1 baseline, losslessly. The training repo, DeepSpec,...
top_stories.author: Asif Razzaq
top_stories.content: DeepSeek open-sourced DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that attaches a draft module to existing DeepSeek-V4 weights. It pairs a parallel draft backbone with a lightweight Markov head to cut suffix decay, then adds confidence-scheduled verification that tailors how many tokens get checked to real-time GPU load. Offline, accepted length rises 16–31% over DFlash and Eagle3; in production it speeds per-user generation 57–85% over the MTP-1 baseline, losslessly. The training repo, DeepSpec,...

top_stories.title: NVIDIA Powers Over 400 of the World’s 500 Fastest Supercomputers
top_stories.description: NVIDIA technologies power more than 400 of the world’s 500 fastest supercomputers — 81% of the TOP500 — according to the latest rankings released this week at the ISC High Performance conference in Hamburg, Germany.
top_stories.author: Chris Porter
top_stories.content: NVIDIA technologies power more than 400 of the world’s 500 fastest supercomputers — 81% of the TOP500 — according to the latest rankings released this week at the ISC High Performance conference in Hamburg, Germany.

top_stories.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
top_stories.description: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
top_stories.content: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

top_stories.title: Optimize model training on Amazon SageMaker AI with NVIDIA Blackwell
top_stories.description: This post shows you how to configure training jobs on Amazon SageMaker AI to get the most out of Blackwell’s architecture on AWS. You learn how to select batch sizes and sequence lengths that take advantage of Blackwell’s expanded memory, choose the right precision format for your model size (1B to 64B parameters), and apply activation checkpointing strategically. By the end, you have a practical framework for tuning your training configuration and launching distributed training jobs on P6-B200...
top_stories.author: Andrea Gallo
